relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains investment product eligibility data, while the outbound file is a pre-approved credit offer (personal loan). These represent fundamentally different financial products with minimal field overlap; the outbound file requires credit-specific data (credit score, employment status, loan terms) that are not present in the investment eligibility inbound file. While both files contain customer_id and email, this alone is insufficient to establish meaningful data lineage between investment eligibility and credit offers.
